form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1710m at Goulburn was 10th-23.6 at the bell, beaten 9 m by The Greek General (2:02.80) in NR up to 80 on March 30 at $101. Before that 8th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 5th-9.85 beaten 12 m by Surf Ace (1:52.70) in NR up to 68 on March 24 at $41. Needs to do more. This looks a far sterner task.
